sys_app_requirement.acceptance_criteria: Attempting to insert a second lesson for the same student in the same ISO week is blocked server-side with a descriptive error. The rule fires on Before Insert and cannot be bypassed from the portal.
sys_app_requirement.description: Implement Business Rules (Before Insert) on the x_german_lesson table to enforce the 1-lesson-per-week constraint server-side. The rule must check whether the inserting student already has a lesson record within the same ISO week (using start_time) and abort the insert with a user-friendly error message if a duplicate is found.
sys_app_requirement.name: REQ-007: Weekly Limit Validation Business Rule
sys_app_requirement.sys_name: REQ-007: Weekly Limit Validation Business Rule
